calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-11-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo this day.
Appearances: Shanee Harrell present in pro per as representative fro Appellant First Smerican Home Warranty. Andrew Cantor, Esq. for ans with the Responde3nts Orette Patrick and Eric Brodrick.

All parties stipulated to a judge pro tem. and are sworn.
Appellant and Respondent testifies on their own behalf and reponds to the questions form the Court with documentary evidence introduced as follows:
Appellant's Exhibit: A - Contract.
B - Photographs.
Respondent's Exhibit: 1- Service Request
2- Appliance Plan.
3- Proposal.
4- Celing Heating Installation document.
5- Report of Findings.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes the matter under submission.
Exhibits are retained by the court.
Dept. 525, Judge Pro Tem Diana Kruze; Clerk S. Ravinantaprich. Not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
